Subject: Senior digital marketer — re: your Partner Marketing Manager - HAL role at Confidential

Hi there,

I came across your Partner Marketing Manager - HAL opening at Confidential, and it lines up closely with my background in digital marketing across paid, CRM and analytics.

A quick note on me — I am a Dubai-based digital, growth and CRM marketer with 10+ years at Majid Al Futtaim, L'Oreal and Samsung. Three results I am proud of:
•  12.5x ROAS on paid media across 8 GCC markets, cost-per-acquisition down 80%
•  A CRM rebuild on a Bloomreach CDP spanning 1.7M+ customer profiles
•  Email revenue up 40x — published by Braze as a global case study

I would welcome the chance to be considered and would gladly share my CV (Aliaa_Mohamed_CV_ATS_Master.docx) and specific case studies. Would you be open to a short conversation?

Warm regards,
Aliaa Mohamed
Dubai, UAE  ·  +971 56 261 7228  ·  aliaa1994@hotmail.co.uk  ·  linkedin.com/in/aliaa-mohamed-digital-marketing
